title: rosa canina var. dollineriana
intro: Rosa canina var. dollineriana, also known as the dog rose, is a variety of the Rosa canina species, a type of wild rose native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its hips, leaves, and flowers. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. dollineriana include its ability to support immune function, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to make rose hip tea, which is rich in vitamins A and C.
